summary: Tested UI fixes and new features for iteration 221. 13/15 backend tests passed. Frontend UI verified: Hero video at 55vh, desktop tabs in 2 rows, mobile tabs with horizontal scroll, Back to Home + X close buttons on mobile, Membership Plan tab, Ticket merge feature (Zoho style), Push notifications Enable button, Paw Points history expandable.

minor.issue: Returns 422 validation error - may need query params
Returns 404 - endpoint may not exist for PUT method

context_for_next_testing_agent: All requested UI fixes verified working. Hero video at 55vh shows dog eyes. Desktop tabs display in 2 rows. Mobile tabs have horizontal scroll with Back to Home and X close buttons. Membership Plan tab shows plan details with validity dates. Ticket merge feature implemented with Zoho Desk style UI. Push notifications Enable button present in Settings. Paw Points history expandable modal works.

hero_video_height.details: Hero section at 55vh (464px on 844px mobile viewport), objectPosition 'center 5%' shows dog eyes

desktop_tab_bar.details: Tabs display in 2 rows: Row 1 (Home, Services, Paw Points, Mira AI, Bookings, Orders, Quotes, Documents, Autoship), Row 2 (Reviews, Pets, Addresses, Settings, Plan)

mobile_tab_bar.details: Horizontal scroll enabled, tabs stable, shows Home, Requests, Pets visible with scroll for more

back_to_home_button.details: Back to Home button appears on mobile when on non-overview tabs (e.g., Requests tab)

x_close_button.details: X close button appears on mobile non-overview tabs next to Back to Home button

membership_plan_tab.details: Plan tab shows Pet Pass Foundation membership with Active status, VALID FROM/UNTIL dates, View Plan Details and Upgrade Plan buttons

ticket_merge_feature.details: Zoho Desk style merge: Select multiple tickets → More dropdown → Merge Tickets option. API endpoint /api/concierge/tickets/merge exists

push_notification_enable.details: Settings tab has Push Notifications section with Enable Now button. VAPID public key endpoint works

pet_photo_upload.details: API endpoint POST /api/pets/{pet_id}/photo exists for photo upload. Stores as base64 in database

paw_points_history.details: View History button opens modal showing Current Balance and transaction history

security_privacy_section.details: Settings tab has Security & Privacy section with Change Password, Two-Factor Authentication, and Privacy Settings buttons
